description: Create a 'Store Blog Post' content type and a 'Blog Categories' vocabulary to manage content for the store. Configure a Taxonomy Vocabulary named 'Blog Categories' (machine name: blog_categories) containing the terms 'Product News', 'Deals & Offers', and 'Tech Tips'. Define a Content Type named 'Store Blog Post' (machine name: store_blog_post) including a 'Featured Product' field (field_featured_product) referencing Commerce Products and a 'Blog Category' field (field_blog_category) referencing the Blog Categories vocabulary. Create and publish a blog post titled 'Top 5 Headphones for 2024' with 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' as the featured product and 'Product News' as the category. Configure a View page accessible at /store-blog that lists these blog posts.
